subject: english
topic_title: Essay Writing: More on Formal Letter
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Recall the definition of a formal letter
Apply the formal style required in official letters

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: Formal letters are official letters written to people in official positions.

sections.heading: Features
sections.content: The note lists writer's address, receiver's address, salutation, heading, body of the letter, and complimentary close. It emphasises formal language and avoidance of slang and contractions.
